name: X-Golf Columbus
about: X-Golf Columbus is an indoor golf simulator venue providing a year-round golfing experience. The facility features virtual play capabilities, along with options for lessons, club fittings, and equipment sales. The venue is designed to accommodate golfers looking for practice, game play, or professional instruction. With offerings including tee time booking, event hosting, and membership options, it serves as a comprehensive indoor golf destination for various skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round indoor golf regardless of weather
Professional coaching and club fitting services available
Versatile event and meeting space options
Flexible booking for tee times and events

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen and food service available

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but the venue also offers club rentals and fittings.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full kitchen and bar, but outside food and drink policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing time varies based on the number of players and bay availability, but typical simulator sessions range from 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue offers family-friendly services and events, though specific age restrictions are not mentioned.
